message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam packageStyle rectangle

actor "Actor" as Actor
participant "Dashboard" as Dashboard
participant "DashboardController" as DashboardController
participant "IssuesDetailController" as IssuesDetailController
participant "IssuesService" as IssuesService
participant "IssuesEntityService" as IssuesEntityService
participant "EntityService" as EntityService
participant "IssuesRepository" as IssuesRepository
participant "IssueRepository" as IssueRepository

== Initial Interaction ==
Actor -> Dashboard: /issues
activate Dashboard
Dashboard -> DashboardController: createIssues()
activate DashboardController
DashboardController --> Dashboard: new / redirect
deactivate DashboardController
Dashboard -x Dashboard
deactivate Dashboard

== Parallel Processing for getIssues ==
par
    Dashboard -> IssuesDetailController: getIssues()
    activate IssuesDetailController
    
    IssuesDetailController -> IssuesService: createIssuesStatistics()
    activate IssuesService
    
    IssuesService -> IssuesEntityService: findAll()
    activate IssuesEntityService
    
    IssuesEntityService -> EntityService: selectAllIssues()
    activate EntityService
    
    EntityService -> IssuesRepository: findAll()
    activate IssuesRepository
    
    loop
        IssuesRepository -> IssuesRepository: new
        database "Issues" as IssuesDB
    end
    
    loop
        IssuesRepository -> IssueRepository: findById(id)
        activate IssueRepository
        IssueRepository -> IssueRepository: new
        database "Issue" as IssueDB
        IssueRepository --> IssuesRepository: Issue
        deactivate IssueRepository
    end
    
    IssuesRepository --> EntityService: Set<Issues>
    deactivate IssuesRepository
    
    EntityService --> IssuesEntityService: Set<Issues>
    deactivate EntityService
    
    IssuesEntityService --> IssuesService: Set<Issues>
    deactivate IssuesEntityService
    
    IssuesService --> IssuesDetailController: IssuesStatistics
    deactivate IssuesService
    
    IssuesDetailController --> Dashboard: IssuesStatistics
    deactivate IssuesDetailController
end

== Report Selection and Details ==
Actor -> Dashboard: select report
activate Dashboard
Dashboard -> DashboardController: details
activate DashboardController
DashboardController --> Dashboard: new / redirect
deactivate DashboardController
Dashboard -x Dashboard
deactivate Dashboard

== Parallel Processing for Categories ==
par
    Dashboard -> IssuesDetailController: getCategories(origin, reference)
    activate IssuesDetailController
    
    IssuesDetailController -> IssuesService: createDistributionByCategory(origin, reference)
    activate IssuesService
    
    IssuesService -> IssuesEntityService: findByPrimaryKey(origin, reference)
    activate IssuesEntityService
    
    IssuesEntityService -> EntityService: select(origin, reference)
    activate EntityService
    
    EntityService -> IssuesRepository: findById(origin, reference)
    activate IssuesRepository
    
    IssuesRepository -> IssuesRepository: new
    database "Issues" as IssuesDB2
    
    loop
        IssuesRepository -> IssueRepository: findById(id)
        activate IssueRepository
        IssueRepository -> IssueRepository: new
        database "Issue" as IssueDB2
        IssueRepository --> IssuesRepository: Issue
        deactivate IssueRepository
    end
    
    IssuesRepository --> EntityService: Issues
    deactivate IssuesRepository
    
    EntityService --> IssuesEntityService: Issues
    deactivate EntityService
    
    IssuesEntityService --> IssuesService: Issues
    deactivate IssuesEntityService
    
    IssuesService --> IssuesDetailController: IssuePropertyDistribution
    deactivate IssuesService
    
    IssuesDetailController --> Dashboard: IssuePropertyDistribution
    deactivate IssuesDetailController
end

@enduml
```
